Dialog.name: MSG_VS_LEADER_BATTLE_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5128 0 0}He's waiting for us... The only way to get past him is to fight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_NOT_ENOUGH
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}It's too dangerous to go without more people![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}Yes, let's make sure we're fully prepared before proceeding.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_Ask_NotFull_VoiceOn
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5003 0 0}There's an opening in your party... Are you sure you still want to go?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4033 0 0}Don't hesitate. That's the least we can do.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_Ask_NotFull_VoiceOff
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 -1 0 0}There's an opening in your party... Are you sure you still want to go?[n]{f 1 1}
